summary: Applied all 31 iOS SDK meeting decisions from ios-doc-as-test-decisions.json. 30 APPROVE_REWRITE blocks rewritten to match AmitySDK v8.1.1 binary API. 1 MARK_TRULY_ILLUSTRATIVE block (viewing-content-block-7) received a skip marker. Final result: 66 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped (100% pass+skip rate).
